title: 9 Moments That Reveal What You're Made Of
caption:
Character isn't built in the big moments. It's revealed in the ordinary ones — the ones that show up before you've had time to perform.

The 2 AM call you almost didn't answer. The win you got and nobody saw you hold. The thing you said when you were wrong and someone was watching.

God uses these moments. Not to shame you — to show you what He's still working on. The man who learns to read them is the man who grows.

Save this. Screenshot the one that stopped you.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #character #discipline #christianity #scripture
theme: He's the same man in every moment — governed, not performing.
